text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Maruzensky has been training hard for the Asahi
Hai F.S.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: So, what's up next for training?
choice_data_list:
You're doing great. Let's stick with what's
working.

You're doing great. Let's stick with what's
working.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Our goal is a G1 race, so wouldn't it be good to
train a little harder?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Hello, Maruzen!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Oh?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
I was watching you train! You're as amazing as
ever!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
I hope you don't mind, but I was observing your
training as well.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
These bright young students still get starry-eyed
when they talk to Maruzensky.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Since transferring to the academy, Special Week
has quickly become a promising up-and-comer,
known for both her skill and friendliness.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And Grass Wonder may seem quiet at first
glance, but her powerful running is already
considered top-class.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Your stride was powerful and your acceleration
was fluid, but above all else...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: You looked like you were having a blast!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Heehee! Everyone's high expectations are what
drive me to run my heart out!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Actually, Maruzensky, I have a favor to ask you...

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: You want to run with me, right?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Wow! That's right! You know me too well!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Your eyes are so sparkly, it's easy to tell.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
And, Grass, you may be quiet, but you're also
bubbling with eagerness.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: W-well, yes... Hehe, sorry to impose.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Trainer, can I go run with these two for a bit?

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Trainer, can I go run with these two for a bit?

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
I think racing with each of them in turn would
make for a great training session.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Thanks! I'm off, then!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Spe, Grass, your elder has got a lot to teach you!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: I'm already taking notes!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: All right! Let's get amped to the max, homegirls!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Get... what?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: You heard her, Grass! Let's get amped!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Um... I was hoping to learn about running.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Ahh, to be young again! Let's run into the sunset
like the end of a coming-of-age movie!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Yes! Into the sunset, Grass!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: But the sun is still directly overhead...

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: I had so much fun training today!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
I used to wonder if it was okay for me to run, not
having a dream and all...

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
But now, I love running ahead and leading the
way for the cute younger students! ♪

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
It's all thanks to you, Trainer, for always watching
over me. ♪
choice_data_list: I'm just glad to see you enjoying yourself.
I'm just glad to see you enjoying yourself.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
It's all thanks to you, Trainer, for always watching
over me. ♪
choice_data_list: I'm just glad to see you enjoying yourself.
I'm just glad to see you enjoying yourself.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, and I'll make sure you have lots of fun in
return!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
...Oh? What's that crowd over there? Is something
groovy happening?

text_block_list.name: Reporter A
text_block_list.text:
Are you saying that you intend to become the top
Umamusume?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Yes, I am prepared to devote my heart and soul
to leading all Umamusume forward.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Yoo-hoo, Rudolf! Are you doing an interview?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Ah, Maruzensky. I was on my way back to the
dorms, but then these reporters showed up.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Symboli Rudolf, the student council president of
Tracen Academy, is one of the stars of the
Twinkle Series.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She is undefeated so far, and, like Maruzensky,
attracting a lot of attention.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
I see you're as popular as always! But I'm not
going to stand by and let you win! ♪

text_block_list.name: Reporter B
text_block_list.text:
The Hot Rod and the Emperor... I can't believe
we've caught these two highly renowned racers
together like this!

text_block_list.name: Reporter C
text_block_list.text:
Symboli Rudolf, please tell us what you think
about Maruzensky.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
I believe she is going to help make the Twinkle
Series very exciting.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: I'm expecting big things from her.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
I'm just running for the fun of it, but I can't help
feeling happy to hear that.

text_block_list.name: Reporter A
text_block_list.text:
Do you think it's likely we'll eventually see a
showdown between the two of you?

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: ...A showdown?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: It is not out of the question.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
If we both push forward, our paths will surely
cross. I have no doubt that the day will come
when we run together.

text_block_list.name: Reporter B
text_block_list.text: We're looking forward to it!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: ...Hehe!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Is something wrong?

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: No... I was just imagining it.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Hey, Trainer, let's train a bit longer today!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Hey, Trainer, let's train a bit longer today!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
I was thinking of going for a drive, but now I feel
like running. ♪

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Come on, we don't want to interrupt the
interview. Let's go!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Heh... She feels like running all of a sudden, does
she?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Maruzensky's abilities and enjoyment are only
increasing as she prepares for the Asahi Hai F.S.
